// note: Canonical recipe TypeScript template. Each recipe inlines these compilerOptions in its own tsconfig.json so a copied folder typechecks without the repo root. scripts/check-consistency.sh diffs recipes against this file.
// moduleResolution: Uses 'bundler' rather than 'nodenext' on purpose: @qvac/sdk 0.15.0's model-constant exports (e.g. LLAMA_3_2_1B_INST_Q4_0) don't resolve under nodenext, though they exist at runtime. tsx (esbuild) resolves the same way at runtime, so this is consistent. See FEEDBACK.md.
